sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: BlackLine Founder Therese Tucker Announces Retirement from Full-Time Executive Role
feed.summary: Therese Tucker, founder of BlackLine, Inc., will retire from her full-time executive role effective June 2, 2026, 25 years after establishing the company. She will remain an active board member and significant shareholder, owning approximately 8% of BlackLine's outstanding shares. Tucker expressed confidence in BlackLine's future, highlighting the success of its StudioBEO platform and AI capabilities, and CEO Owen Ryan lauded her vision for modern accounting.

feed.title: BlackLine founder Therese Tucker to retire from executive role in June
feed.summary: Therese Tucker, the founder and largest individual shareholder of BlackLine Inc. (NASDAQ: BL), will retire from her full-time executive role on June 2, 2026, but will remain on the company's board of directors. Tucker founded BlackLine 25 years ago and recently returned to a management position, during which the company launched its Studio360 platform and integrated AI capabilities. CEO Owen Ryan praised Tucker's significant contributions to the accounting software industry.

feed.title: Satellogic (SATL) CFO gains 47,872 shares as RSUs vest, holds 192,283
feed.summary: Satellogic Inc.'s CFO, Rick Dunn, reported a routine equity compensation event where 47,872 restricted stock units (RSUs) vested on March 20, 2026. A portion of these shares was withheld for taxes, and after these transactions, Dunn directly holds 192,283 shares of Satellogic Class A Common Stock. These transactions were not open-market buys or sells but rather the conversion of pre-granted RSUs.

feed.title: Paysign, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results; Patient Affordability Drives 40% Revenue Growth and Significant Margin Expansion
feed.summary: Paysign, Inc. (NASDAQ: PAYS) announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025, driven significantly by its patient affordability offerings. The company reported a 40.5% increase in total revenues to $82.0 million for the full year, with patient affordability revenue surging by 167.8%. Paysign also provided an optimistic outlook for 2026, projecting continued revenue growth and margin expansion, with anticipated net income nearly doubling.

feed.title: Vontier Corp stock stands out as stable performer in industrial technology amid market volatility
feed.summary: Vontier Corp (ISIN: US92886T1051) is highlighted as a stable and resilient performer in the industrial technologies sector, offering essential products for fuel management, fleet telematics, and environmental monitoring. Despite market volatility and challenges in broader industrial sectors, the company's focus on mission-critical tools, recurring revenue streams, and strong North American market presence positions it for sustained demand and growth. US investors seeking stability and diversification are encouraged to consider Vontier, particularly given its alignment with governmental infrastructure initiatives and its competitive edge in integrated hardware-software solutions.

feed.title: VinFast (VFS) CFO Nguyen Anh Thi Lan reported as insider on Form 3
feed.summary: VinFast Auto Ltd. has filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) for its new Chief Financial Officer, Nguyen Anh Thi Lan, identifying her as both a director and officer of the company. The filing, dated March 24, 2026, details her address and role but does not report any share purchases, sales, or other equity transactions by her. This Form 3 is a formal record of her insider status, without indicating any beneficial ownership of securities at this time.

feed.title: Vir Biotechnology (VIR) accounting chief sells 7,711 shares under plan
feed.summary: Vir Biotechnology's Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, Brent Sabatini, sold 7,711 shares of common stock at $9.12 per share on March 23, 2026. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on December 19, 2025. Following the sale, Sabatini directly holds 61,902 shares of Vir Biotechnology common stock.

feed.title: Wells Fargo’s Joe Montgomery: Why This Is the Golden Age for Advisors
feed.summary: Joe Montgomery, Managing Director at Wells Fargo Advisors, discusses with Tony Sirianni why the current era marks a "golden age" for financial advisors, emphasizing the transformative potential of technology like AI to enhance efficiency and client service. He highlights how advisors can leverage new tools for broader asset allocation and prospecting, offering clients solutions beyond conventional approaches. Montgomery also stresses the importance of continuity of care, mentorship, and building a standardized "playbook" for advisory teams to ensure long-term business viability.

feed.title: HP Surges with AI Products and Solid Earnings Beat
feed.summary: HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations with an EPS of $0.81 and revenue of $14.44 billion, primarily driven by growth in Personal Systems and AI PCs. The company is strategically focusing on AI-enhanced products, including new PCs and printers, underscored by the integration of AMD Ryzen AI chips. Despite maintaining its annual forecast, management noted potential lower-end performance due to cost pressures, leading to cautious analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Amcor plc stock sees fresh institutional interest as Gilman Hill and Schaper Benz boost stakes amid Q2 earnings anticipation
feed.summary: Amcor plc is attracting significant institutional interest with new investments from Gilman Hill Asset Management and increased stakes from Schaper Benz & Wise, ahead of its fiscal 2026 Q2 earnings release on February 3. Investors are drawn to Amcor's stable packaging business, defensive positioning in essential goods, and strong dividend yield, signaling confidence in its resilience amid volatile markets. The article highlights Amcor's robust North American presence, diversified product portfolio, and potential for growth, while also cautioning about a high dividend payout ratio and supply chain risks.

feed.title: Better Home & Finance Holding Company Appoints Hugh Frater, Former Fannie Mae CEO and BlackRock Founding Partner, to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ: BETR) has appointed Hugh Frater, former CEO of Fannie Mae and a founding partner of BlackRock, to its Board of Directors, effective March 23, 2026. Frater brings extensive experience in capital markets and housing finance, which will be crucial as Better scales its AI-powered Tinman platform to enhance the mortgage experience. His appointment is expected to help guide the company's long-term strategy and reinforce its mission to make homeownership more accessible and affordable.

feed.title: UDR Inc. stock faces scrutiny amid insider awards and major institutional stake as REIT sector navigates 2026 rate outlook
feed.summary: UDR Inc., an S&P 500 multifamily REIT, is under scrutiny as it expanded its board and granted insider equity awards, while Cohen & Steers disclosed a significant 7.92% stake. These developments coincide with evolving apartment demand and financing costs in a stabilizing interest rate environment, which are shaping investor focus for US portfolios. The company's strategy involves strengthening its leadership and aligning director incentives with shareholder value, signaling a strategic refresh for 2026 amid a changing REIT sector landscape.

feed.title: A.O. Smith Corp. stock faces pressure despite dividend hike amid industrial sector headwinds
feed.summary: A.O. Smith Corp. (ISIN: US0003711006) stock is under selling pressure on the NYSE despite a recent dividend increase. Investors are concerned about weakening demand in water heating and treatment markets due to residential construction slowdowns and rising input costs. The company's strong brand and dividend growth appeal to long-term investors, but near-term performance is challenged by cyclical demand shifts and cost pressures.

feed.title: Steris plc stock faces scrutiny amid healthcare sector pressures and infection prevention demand shi
feed.summary: Steris plc, a global leader in infection prevention and healthcare sterilization, is under investor scrutiny due to rising operational costs and evolving hospital budgets. Despite challenges, the company demonstrates resilience with over 70% of its revenue coming from recurring consumables and services. Steris benefits from its essential role in hospital workflows, particularly with increasing regulatory focus on sterility, and maintains strong financial health.

feed.title: Merck to Acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Boosting Oncology Pipeline
feed.summary: Merck announced its acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc. for $6.7 billion, significantly expanding its oncology pipeline. The deal focuses on TERN-701, an experimental oral treatment for chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) which recently received Orphan Drug Designation. This acquisition aims to strengthen Merck's position in hematology and cancer treatment by leveraging Terns' innovation with Merck's resources.

feed.title: Southern California Gas (SOCGM) COO Rodger Schwecke plans August 2026 retirement
feed.summary: Southern California Gas Company (SOCGM) Chief Operating Officer, Rodger R. Schwecke, announced his retirement effective August 1, 2026, after more than 44 years with the Sempra family of companies. This planned leadership transition provides several months for the company to manage succession and ensure operational continuity. The announcement was made via an 8-K filing on March 20, 2026.

feed.title: PPG Industries Inc. stock faces pressure amid skilled trades investment and InsightsNav launch on NY
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. announced a $10 million investment in skilled trades development and launched InsightsNav, a data analytics platform for marine coatings, as its stock trades under pressure around $103 USD. These strategic moves aim to bolster long-term resilience and address workforce shortages in the industrial sector. Despite recent stock declines, the initiatives position PPG for growth by integrating workforce development and digital services while navigating a challenging materials sector environment.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants (DRI) director sells 2,333 shares, corrects price
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants director William S. Simon filed an amended Form 4 to correct the reported sale price of 2,333 shares of common stock, which was initially based on erroneous brokerage information. The shares were sold at $203.96 each, and Simon now directly holds 6,281 shares. The amendment confirms that no other details from the original filing were changed.

feed.title: 29,171 Performance Units, 21,831 RSUs noted in HPE (NYSE: HPE) Form 144
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (HPE) has filed a Form 144, indicating proposed sales related to employee equity vesting. The filing specifies 29,171 Performance Units scheduled to vest on December 9, 2025, and 21,831 Restricted Stock Units vesting on December 6, 2025. This regulatory notice signals the intent to sell these vested shares but does not confirm completed transactions or cash proceeds.

feed.title: Fifth Third (FITB) Expands App Capabilities, Truist Lowers PT
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) recently enhanced its mobile banking app with new financial management features, allowing users to track spending, set savings goals, and gain insights into their finances. This development reflects the company's commitment to digital innovation for improving customer experience. Concurrently, Truist adjusted its price target for FITB from $60 to $53, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock, following recent conference discussions.

feed.title: Regeneron to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results and Host Conference Call and Webcast on April 29, 2026
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before U.S. markets open. The company will also host a conference call and simultaneous webcast at 8:30 AM Eastern Time on the same day. Interested parties can access the webcast or register to participate via telephone through links provided on Regeneron's investor relations website.

feed.title: Hallador Energy Company Secures Record Capacity Pricing in Three-Year Agreement
feed.summary: Hallador Energy Company announced a three-year agreement to sell substantially all of its remaining accredited capacity to a utility customer at record pricing. This deal is expected to generate approximately $86 million in cumulative revenue and significantly increases the capacity pricing levels for its Merom facility. The company anticipates that future capacity revenues could more than double starting in 2029, a majority of which is expected to translate directly to operating cash flow.

feed.title: Waste Management (WM) revises EBITDA and leverage covenant in credit deal
feed.summary: Waste Management, Inc. recently amended its Seventh Amended and Restated Revolving Credit Agreement on March 20, 2026. This amendment modifies the definitions of EBIT and EBITDA used in the leverage ratio covenant, allowing for equity-based compensation and interest accretion to be added back as non-cash items. The company states these changes are intended to improve comparability with industry peers regarding how non-cash expenses are treated in covenant calculations.

feed.title: Why higher jet-fuel costs are clouding Delta (DAL)’s near-term earnings outlook
feed.summary: This article discusses how rising jet-fuel costs are negatively impacting Delta Air Lines' near-term earnings outlook. The increased expense of fuel, a significant operational cost for airlines, is creating headwinds for the company's profitability.

feed.title: Albemarle (NYSE: ALB) extends key credit facility and trims SOFR rate add-on
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation announced a third amendment to its 2022 credit agreement, extending the maturity date to at least October 28, 2028, with a possible one-year extension. The amendment also removes a 0.10% interest rate adjustment on SOFR-based loans, slightly reducing borrowing costs, but limits the company to a single maturity extension request. This adjustment is described as a routine, maintenance-oriented update to its core bank credit facility.

feed.title: California CarMax Dealerships to Pay $1.1 Million to Settle Consumer Protection Lawsuit
feed.summary: California CarMax dealerships have agreed to pay $1.1 million to settle a consumer protection lawsuit. The suit alleged CarMax failed to timely transfer vehicle registration and ownership documentation to purchasers, violating state law. As part of the settlement, CarMax will implement enhanced business practices and pay civil penalties, investigative costs, and funds for consumer protection efforts.

feed.title: Board veterans to exit ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) after 2026 meeting
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) announced that directors Gerald B. Smith and Pattye L. Moore will retire from its board at the close of their current terms on May 20, 2026, coinciding with the company's annual meeting of shareholders. Smith's retirement is due to the mandatory age retirement policy, while Moore chose not to seek re-election. The company confirmed that their decisions were not due to any disagreements regarding ONEOK's operations, policies, or practices.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc. stock rises amid strong analyst upgrades and robust banking sector momentum
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. stock has seen a significant rise on the NYSE, trading at 114.90 USD, following strong analyst upgrades and robust banking sector momentum. The company's financial performance shows improving net interest margins, growth in services and wealth management segments, and solid financial fundamentals including a market cap of 156.2 billion USD and a 2.51% dividend yield. Despite potential risks like regulatory pressures and economic slowdowns, analysts maintain a "buy" consensus, positioning Citigroup as a compelling pick for investors in a high-rate environment.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment opens pre-registration in Alberta
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has opened pre-registration for its services in Alberta, Canada, anticipating the launch of the province's regulated online gaming market. The market entry process requires operators to register with the AGLC for regulatory approval and then engage with the Alberta iGaming Corporation (AiGC) for commercial contracts, including integration with a centralised self-exclusion program. The AiGC has also partnered with the Responsible Gambling Council, making RG Check accreditation a mandatory requirement for all online gaming sites entering the market.

feed.title: Raymond James (NYSE: RJF) shows 16% asset growth in February 2026 data
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial released its February 2026 operating data, highlighting significant growth across its wealth and asset management metrics. The company reported a 16% year-over-year increase in client assets under administration, reaching a record $1.83 trillion, driven by higher equity markets and net asset inflows. Additionally, Private Client Group assets and financial assets under management saw strong double-digit percentage growth, while investment banking revenues for the first two months of the current quarter were up approximately 5% compared to the prior year.

feed.title: Quanta Services Inc. stock gains attention ahead of Investor Day with strong FY2026 guidance and rec
feed.summary: Quanta Services Inc. is attracting investor interest ahead of its Investor Day on March 31, 2026, driven by record Q4 2025 earnings, robust FY2026 EPS guidance, and a record $44 billion backlog. The company, a leader in infrastructure services for power and renewables, is poised to capitalize on the energy transition and demand from AI-driven data centers. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a strong price target, reflecting optimism for the company's strategic growth initiatives and operational strength despite execution and integration risks.

feed.title: Everest Appoints Jason Busti as Head of North America Treaty Reinsurance
feed.summary: Everest Group, Ltd. has appointed Jason Busti as Head of North America Treaty Reinsurance. He will be responsible for leading the division's treaty reinsurance business across the United States, Bermuda, and Canada, reporting to Jill Beggs, EVP and CEO of Reinsurance. Busti previously served as President of North America at AXIS Re and held senior leadership roles at Swiss Re.

feed.title: Dover Fueling Solutions Launches ProGauge DMP MagRF to Transform Wired Probes into Wireless Connectivity for Retail and Industrial Fueling Operations – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Dover Fueling Solutions has launched the ProGauge DMP MagRF, a device that converts wired magnetostrictive probes into wireless ones for fuel and convenience retail operations. This innovation provides secure and reliable communication between probes and tank gauge consoles, offering a cost-effective and easily installable automatic tank gauge solution for various applications. The DMP MagRF aims to reduce total cost of ownership with its long-lasting battery and minimal site interruption during upgrades.

feed.title: A battery that lasts up to 5 years powers Dover’s new wireless fuel probe
feed.summary: Dover Fueling Solutions (DFS) has launched the ProGauge DMP MagRF, a wireless module that converts existing wired ProGauge DMP and DMP Flex magnetostrictive probes to wireless operation. This solution simplifies installations, offers secure communication, and features a single battery with a life expectancy of 3-5 years, reducing the total cost of ownership. The product is available globally and is suitable for both retail and industrial fueling applications.

feed.title: Citibank Announces $2 Billion Redemption of 5.438% Notes Due 2026 and $1 Billion Redemption of Floating Rate Notes Due 2026
feed.summary: Citibank is redeeming $2 billion of its 5.438% Notes due 2026 and $1 billion of its Floating Rate Notes due 2026, with a redemption date of March 30, 2026. This action aligns with Citibank's liability management strategy to enhance funding and capital structure efficiency. Interest on these notes will cease accruing on the redemption date, and the cash redemption price will be par plus accrued and unpaid interest.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc Stock (ANET) Closed Up by 3.05% on Mar 25: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc (ANET) saw its stock rise by 3.05% on March 25, driven by its critical role in AI infrastructure through innovations like the XPO liquid-cooled optics module. The company's strong financial performance, including raising its fiscal year 2026 revenue outlook, and positive analyst ratings with increased price targets further contributed to this upward movement. Despite some insider selling, the overall market sentiment remains positive due to Arista's strong positioning in the AI networking market.

feed.title: Hallador locks in power capacity prices at 2x current levels
feed.summary: Hallador Energy (NASDAQ:HNRG) has secured a three-year agreement to sell substantially all remaining accredited capacity for planning years 2026 through summer 2028 at record pricing, approximately twice current forward sales book levels. This deal is expected to generate $86 million in cumulative revenue over its term and could support annual capacity revenues of roughly $130 million starting in 2029, with most incremental revenue converting to operating cash flow due to the Merom plant's fixed cost structure. The company also noted progress on its proposed 515MW natural gas simple cycle project.

feed.title: Dell (DELL) Chief Customer Officer sells 143,067 shares in open-market trade
feed.summary: Dell Technologies Inc.'s Chief Customer Officer, William F. Scannell, sold 143,067 shares of Class C Common Stock at $165.00 per share in an open-market transaction. Following this sale, Scannell directly holds 21,779 shares, representing a substantial reduction of his reported direct holdings. The transaction was a straightforward sale with no derivative exercises reported.

feed.title: SeaStar Medical reports $1.2M revenue for 2025, narrows annual loss to $12.2M
feed.summary: SeaStar Medical reported a significant increase in net revenue to $1.234 million in 2025, up from $135 thousand in 2024, and substantially narrowed its net loss to $12.2 million from $24.8 million. The company's QUELIMMUNE product gained commercial traction in pediatric centers, with 13 new children's hospitals added to its customer base. Additionally, SeaStar Medical made notable progress in its clinical trials, including surpassing 50% enrollment in the NEUTRALIZE-AKI adult pivotal trial and initiating a new study for cardiorenal syndrome.

feed.title: Affiliate of VeriSign (NASDAQ: VRSN) files Form 144 reporting planned share sales
feed.summary: An affiliate of VeriSign, Thomas C. Indelicarto, has filed a Form 144, indicating proposed sales of Common shares through multiple transactions in early 2026. This filing is a notice of intent to sell and not a confirmation of completed sales, which are modest relative to VeriSign's total outstanding shares. The Form 144 outlines several transactions, including 498 shares proposed to be sold on March 25, 2026, and also details past sales from January to March 2026.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Illinois Tool Works (ITW) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) has experienced mixed stock performance recently, with declines over the last 7 and 30 days, but gains year-to-date and over the past year. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is overvalued by 56.1% at its current price of US$265 per share, indicating an intrinsic value of US$169.84. However, based on its Price/Earnings ratio of 24.9x, which is below the industry average and Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 32.25x, the shares appear undervalued on an earnings multiple basis.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Warns Dollar Rally Is Short Lived Amid Iran War
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley predicts that the dollar's recent rally will be short-lived. The firm attributes this to shrinking interest-rate differentials between the US and Europe and the dampening effect of the Iran war on global economic growth. The dollar's current strength is seen as a temporary safe-haven and energy producer currency benefit following recent geopolitical events.

feed.title: [8-K] SeaStar Medical Holding Corp Reports Ma...
feed.summary: SeaStar Medical Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: ICU) reported strong financial results for 2025, with net revenue significantly increasing to $1.23 million from $135 thousand in 2024, driven by QUELIMMUNE therapy sales. The company also reduced its net loss and improved its cash position. Key business achievements include expanding QUELIMMUNE's customer base, completing enrollment in a pediatric post-marketing registry, and advancing pivotal trials for adult Acute Kidney Injury (AKI) and cardio-renal conditions.

feed.title: Multilingual AI call agents: Healthcare Triangle targets U.S., Latin America
feed.summary: Healthcare Triangle, Inc. (HCTI) has launched an Agentic AI solution within Teyame.AI's Customer Engagement Platform, aiming to expand its presence in the United States and Latin America. This initiative targets a rapidly growing Agentic AI market, projected to reach $199.05 billion by 2034, driven by demand for autonomous operations and multilingual capabilities. The new platform offers advanced features like human-like voice articulation, real-time lead scoring, and seamless cross-channel handoffs to improve customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser awards $13,500 in Giving Fund grants to four Coos County nonprofits
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser has awarded $13,500 in philanthropic grants through its Giving Fund to four Coos County nonprofits in Oregon. These grants support workforce development, education initiatives, and community projects, including a tsunami evacuation sound system for the Bandon School District. Across Oregon, Weyerhaeuser distributed nearly $280,000 in grant funding this year, focusing on areas like environmental stewardship, education, and human services.

feed.title: GDTC Forecast — Price Prediction for 2026. Should I Buy GDTC?
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed analysis and price prediction for CytoMed Therapeutics Ltd (GDTC) stock, indicating a "Strong Sell" recommendation based on negative technical signals, bearish moving average trends, and short-selling activity. Although GDTC experienced a slight increase recently, it has shown an overall decline over the past three years. The report suggests October as the month with the highest probability for positive returns based on seasonality, but generally advises caution due to several negative indicators.

feed.title: Major Angel Oak Mortgage REIT (NYSE: AOMR) holder sells 481K shares
feed.summary: A major shareholder of Angel Oak Mortgage REIT (NYSE: AOMR), Xylem Finance LLC, associated with Davidson Kempner, sold 481,537 shares of common stock at $7.87 per share on March 20, 2026. Despite this sale, Xylem Finance LLC still retains a substantial indirect holding of 3,652,673 shares. The transaction, filed as a Form 4, indicates a partial reduction by a large holder, with reporting persons disclaiming beneficial ownership beyond their pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Union Pacific Corp. Hits Day Low of $233.04 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corp. experienced a significant stock decline, dropping 3.05% to an intraday low of $233.04, contrasting with the S&P 500's smaller fall. While the company has seen an 11.35% decrease over the past month, its year-to-date performance shows a modest gain. Financial analysis indicates high management efficiency but flags concerns regarding its debt-to-EBITDA ratio despite record operating cash flow.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Giving Fund awards 25 Lane County grants to Eugene and Cottage Grove nonprofits
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser's Giving Fund has awarded $120,500 in philanthropic grants to 25 nonprofits across Lane County, Oregon. These grants will support workforce development, education initiatives, and community projects in Eugene and Cottage Grove. The company's employees help determine funding priorities, and this year's contributions are part of a larger distribution of nearly $280,000 across Oregon.

feed.title: Paycom Earns Top Rankings in G2 Spring 2026 Reports
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC), a leading provider of cloud-based human capital management software, has been recognized with top honors in G2's Spring 2026 Grid® Reports. The company earned the "best software" distinction in several key categories, including HR Service Delivery, Compensation Management, eLearning Content, Background Check, Training Management Systems, Benefit Support, and Earned Wage Access. These accolades reflect strong customer satisfaction with Paycom's full-solution automation across core HR, payroll, and workforce management functions, earning them over 60 Leader badges and other recognitions for ease of use and best relationships.
